zh.lifeSummary: 當Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches於0960年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾托斯尼時，他的父親Raoul I de Tosny et de Conches41歲，母親Godebelt de BELLEME21歲。他於0979年與Judith de Bayeux在法國豪-諾門迪艾萊斯 安德利斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他在法國豪-諾門迪艾托斯尼被列為feudal lord of tosny and conches。他去世於1026年在他的家鄉享年66歲，埋葬在法國豪-諾門迪艾萊斯 安德利斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches于0960年出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾托斯尼时，他的父亲Raoul I de Tosny et de Conches41岁，母亲Godebelt de BELLEME21岁。他于0979年与Judith de Bayeux在法国豪-諾門迪艾萊斯 安德利斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他在法国豪-諾門迪艾托斯尼被列为feudal lord of tosny and conches。他去世于1026年在他的家乡享年66岁，埋葬在法国豪-諾門迪艾萊斯 安德利斯。

meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches was born in 0960, in Tosny, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Raoul I de Tosny et de Conches, was 41 and his mother, Godebelt de BELLEME, was 21. He married Judith de Bayeux in 0979, in Les Andelys, Eure, Upper Normandy, France. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. His occupation is listed as feudal lord of tosny and conches in Tosny, Eure, Upper Normandy, France. He died in 1026, in his hometown, at the age of 66, and was buried in Les Andelys, Eure, Upper Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches est né en 0960, à Tosny, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Raoul I de Tosny et de Conches, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Godebelt de BELLEME, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Judith de Bayeux en 0979, à Les Andelys, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est feudal lord of tosny and conches à Tosny, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France. Il est décédé en 1026, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à Les Andelys, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches 0960 in Tosny, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raoul I de Tosny et de Conches 41 und seine Mutter Godebelt de BELLEME 21. Er hat 0979 in Les Andelys, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich Judith de Bayeux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als feudal lord of tosny and conches in Tosny, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich aufgeführt. Er starb 1026 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Les Andelys, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches è nato il nel 0960 nel Tosny, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Raoul I de Tosny et de Conches, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Godebelt de BELLEME, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Judith de Bayeux nel 0979, nel Les Andelys, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come feudal lord of tosny and conches nel Tosny, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Morì nel 1026, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a Les Andelys, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conchesが0960年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアトスニーで生まれた時，父Raoul I de Tosny et de Conchesは41歳，母Godebelt de BELLEMEは21歳であった。0979年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアレス アンデリスでJudith de Bayeuxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。フランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアトスニーでの職業はfeudal lord of tosny and conchesと記録されている。彼は1026年に故郷で66歳で死去し，フランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアレス アンデリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches(이)가 0960년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 토스니에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raoul I de Tosny et de Conches(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Godebelt de BELLEME(은)는 21세였다. 그는 0979년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 레스 앤들리스에서 Judith de Bayeux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 토스니에서 feudal lord of tosny and conches이었다. 그는 1026년 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 레스 앤들리스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches nasceu em 0960, em Tosny, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Raoul I de Tosny et de Conches, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Godebelt de BELLEME, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Judith de Bayeux em 0979, em Les Andelys, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como feudal lord of tosny and conches em Tosny, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França. Ele faleceu em 1026, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em Les Andelys, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches родился в 0960 г. в местности тосни, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Raoul I de Tosny et de Conches было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Godebelt de BELLEME, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Judith de Bayeux в 0979 г. в местности лесь анделиз, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери.  Он работал по профессии feudal lord of tosny and conches в местности тосни, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция. Он умер в 1026 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности лесь анделиз, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Raoul II Seigneur de Tosny et de Conches nació en 0960, en Tosny, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Raoul I de Tosny et de Conches, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Godebelt de BELLEME, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Judith de Bayeux en 0979, en Les Andelys, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era feudal lord of tosny and conches en Tosny, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia. Murió en 1026, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en Les Andelys, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia.
